title: Multiplayer player + WebSocket sync for commons

log.context: Multiplayer player + WebSocket sync for commons

Done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Backend — `/mnt/data/clunger/src/index.ts`**
- Installed `ws@8.20.0` package
- Added `GET /api/commons/ws` WebSocket endpoint via `server.on("upgrade")` with a `WebSocketServer({ noServer: true })`
- In-memory `commonsPlayers` map; each connection gets a UUID
- Move messages throttled at 50ms per client; broadcasts full player map on every update
- Stale players (15s no update) evicted on each broadcast
